name: emergency-prep-planner
description: Transform a home description into a comprehensive emergency preparedness plan with supply lists, evacuation routes, communication protocols, and insurance review checklist.

entry_inputs.name: home_description
entry_inputs.description: Plain-text description of the home including location, size, number of occupants, pets, medical needs, mobility constraints, and special considerations.

entry_inputs.name: local_hazards
entry_inputs.description: List of relevant local hazards (e.g., 'flooding', 'wildfires', 'hurricanes', 'earthquakes'). Defaults to common hazards for region if not provided.

entry_inputs.name: existing_insurance_info
entry_inputs.description: Current insurance policy details including coverage type, limits, and gaps. If not provided, checklist will recommend review of all policies.

entry_inputs.name: include_pet_supplies
entry_inputs.description: Whether to include pet-specific emergency supplies. Defaults to true if pets mentioned in home_description.

terminal_outputs.name: home_profile
terminal_outputs.description: Validated and structured home information with fields: location, occupant_count, occupant_types, pets, medical_needs, mobility_constraints, home_type, square_footage, clarification_needed.

terminal_outputs.name: supply_list
terminal_outputs.description: Categorized emergency supplies with quantities, units, notes, and expiration dates.

terminal_outputs.name: evacuation_plan
terminal_outputs.description: Routes and procedures with primary/secondary routes, meeting points, shelter locations, accessibility notes, transportation needs, and pet evacuation plan.

terminal_outputs.name: communication_protocol
terminal_outputs.description: Contact procedures with household contact list, out-of-area contact, check-in methods, communication tools, special communication needs, and wallet card data.

terminal_outputs.name: insurance_checklist
terminal_outputs.description: Review items with coverage gaps, documentation needed, policy review items, high-risk recommendations, financial preparedness items, and next steps.

terminal_outputs.name: final_plan_document
terminal_outputs.description: Formatted, printable emergency preparedness plan combining all sections with introduction, instructions, action items, and appendices.
